title: Recruitment 4-key negotiation chart
purpose: Recruitment standoff chart rebuilt on the detected 136 BPM quarter-beat grid, preserving the clean ending while removing the old 92 BPM drift.
patternDesign: 136 BPM straight-beat revision with the first playable beat at 4.008s. All note starts are snapped to integer quarter beats; syncopated 0.5/0.75-beat placements were removed while preserving section density and pattern intent.

sections.name: prepare silence
sections.intent: no notes for the first four seconds so the player can prepare for the standoff
sections.patternIntent: 4-second no-note preparation window; integer quarter-beat starts only

sections.name: opening stare
sections.intent: sparse question-answer notes introduce the recruitment standoff
sections.patternIntent: opening call-and-response; integer quarter-beat starts only

sections.name: push and pull
sections.intent: recognizable left-right persuasion and resistance loops
sections.patternIntent: push-pull conversation; integer quarter-beat starts only

sections.name: rising tension
sections.intent: tension rises with readable pressure steps
sections.patternIntent: rising standoff; integer quarter-beat starts only

sections.name: negotiation duel
sections.intent: the strongest negotiation moment gets chords and a clean suspense hold
sections.patternIntent: duel highlight; integer quarter-beat starts only

sections.name: cooling glance
sections.intent: brief lower-density recovery after the duel
sections.patternIntent: cooling recovery; integer quarter-beat starts only

sections.name: last persuasion
sections.intent: final persuasion returns to the familiar loop with slightly stronger accents
sections.patternIntent: late-song push; integer quarter-beat starts only

sections.name: decision moment
sections.intent: decision cadence reaches the ending and then leaves the required silence
sections.patternIntent: clean final answer; integer quarter-beat starts only

recruit_contact.description: Sparse question-answer taps for the opening standoff.

recruit_push.description: D F to J K persuasion loop, with clear call and response.

recruit_answer.description: Reverse K J to F D answer loop.

recruit_offer_chord.description: Split-hand chord used when the argument lands.

recruit_hold_suspense.description: Short suspense hold; K hold never resolves into a K chord.

recruit_duel.description: Negotiation duel motif with quicker but still readable steps.

recruit_decision.description: Final decision cadence that keeps the existing clean ending.
